expectations.text: Identifies the correct contrast ratio threshold (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
expectations.evidence: Table showing 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text, with note about projected points likely being normal size

expectations.text: Suggests a tool or method to check the actual contrast ratio
expectations.evidence: Suggests browser DevTools color picker and Coolors Contrast Checker with specific URL

expectations.text: Identifies the color-only dot as a WCAG 1.4.1 violation
expectations.evidence: Explicitly names WCAG 1.4.1 Use of Color and explains both colorblind and screen reader user impact

expectations.text: Provides a concrete fix for the color-only dot (adding text, icon, or label)
expectations.evidence: Two options: text label ('Q', 'Out', 'GTD') and shape/icon; plus sr-only fix for screen readers

expectations.text: References specific WCAG criteria (e.g., 1.4.3 for contrast, 1.4.1 for color-only)
expectations.evidence: Both WCAG 1.4.3 and 1.4.1 named explicitly with AA level
